notes:
Camp Sweetgum's daily schedule.  Ten time blocks per day, keyed by time_index (0-9).  Structure gives shape · Sam can arrive late, skip, or explore during any block, but the world responds:
  · During BREAKFAST, all campers who aren't Sam are in the mess hall.
  · During MORNING_ACTIVITY, they're at that activity's zone.
  · During FREE_TIME, campers scatter to their cabins, the boathouse, Alder Pond, or the north bluff.
  · Skipping meals raises Sam's hunger meter (currently a soft cap only).
  · Sleeping in Sam's bunk advances time to the next morning's WAKE (index 0 of the next day).

Activity blocks vary by day (see days.json anchor_event).  Meals are the same time every day.  Evening events land in EVENING_EVENT.  QUIET_TIME and LIGHTS_OUT are wind-down.

Wave G ships the schedule shape + the block-boundary logic in CampOverworld.  NPC-position-by-block is Wave G-tail (needs cabins Beaver/Osprey/Kestrel and the activity zones authored first).  For now, the schedule is a legible clock that gates content later waves will hook into.
